name: chore-prune-pydeps
maintained_via: Re-run skill workflow on 2–3 package targets; update SKILL.md if new deptry patterns or repo requirements structure changes emerge.

strategies_catalog.purpose: Deterministic patterns for detecting and safely removing unused Python deps in layered requirements monorepo using uvx deptry, grep, and uv tooling.

entries.applies_to: Scanning packages with _base.in/_test.in deps instead of pyproject.toml.
Validating DEP002 flagged packages are truly unimported before deletion.
entries.helper: uv pip tree --package and grep -rnw for direct import presence

entries.applies_to: Distinguishing direct vs. inherited DEP002 when packages use --requirement includes.
entries.helper: Filter by package name; prune only direct _base.in declarations.

entries.applies_to: Manual audit when deptry fails (network, unsupported layout).
entries.helper: grep -Rho + sed pipeline to normalize import module names

entries.applies_to: Recompiling only affected services after pruning a library.
entries.helper: make reqs upgrade=<pkg> instead of blanket make reqs

entries.applies_to: Verifying pruned package and downstream services compile and pass tests.
entries.helper: make install-dev && make tests-unit per package

authoring_guidelines: Always use uvx for scanner isolation; never pip install into project venv.
Filter deptry output for direct _base.in declarations only; inherited DEP002 means prune at origin, not downstream.
Run deptry in --requirements-files mode (not pyproject.toml) due to repo's layered *.in structure.
Verify every DEP002 candidate with grep before editing; false positives occur with plugins and string-imports.
Recompile only affected packages downstream; minimize diff coupling by avoiding blanket make reqs.
token_budget_strategy: Low-cost Claude Haiku optimized. Uses deterministic external tools (uvx, grep, sed, make) with minimal AI reasoning. Model invocations are read-only (SKILL.md parsing) plus light deptry output filtering.
changelog: 2026-06-01: v1.0 created. Added repo-specific catpcha section on layered requirements, inherited DEP002 handling, and src-vs-tests scanning. Documented deptry --requirements-files mode for packages without pyproject.toml. Fallback grep-based import scan added. Marked for periodic quarterly maintenance.
